name: asljs-observable
description: Lightweight observable for JS. Emits events on property changes via on/off/emit. Works with objects, arrays, and primitives.
author: "Alex Netkachov" <alex.netkachov@gmail.com>

scripts.prepack: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test && npm run build:dist && npm run guard:clean-git
scripts.coverage: npm run build:test && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=.coverage node --test dist/*.test.js && node -e "console.log('Coverage in .coverage (use c8/istanbul if you want reports)')"
scripts.all: npm run clean && npm run format && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build:dist && npm run build && npm run test
